LanguageData.parasite_sex_desc: Pawns will catch parasites from sex with infected pawn.
LanguageData.parasite_floor_desc: Pawns will catch parasites from sex in dirty environment.
LanguageData.parasite_show_roll_to_catch_desc: Logs the process of handing out parasites after sex for debug purposes (or for anyone who's curious)
LanguageData.parasite_min_severity_to_pitch_desc: parasite infections must be at least this severe to spread between pawns
LanguageData.parasite_outdoor_cleanliness_desc: Cleanliness stat for sex outdoor RoomStatDefOf.Cleanliness = this
LanguageData.opp_inf_initial_immunity_desc: Chance to get additional infections due to Immunodeficiency
LanguageData.pawn_spawn_with_parasite_mul_desc: Multiplier to spawn pawn with parasites (parasite base chance * this).
LanguageData.nymph_spawn_with_parasite_mul_desc: Multiplier to spawn nymphs with parasites (parasite base chance * this)
LanguageData.RJW_Opportunistic_Infection_Message: {0} has developed an infection due to a weakened immune system.
LanguageData.RJW_Syphilis_Damage_Message: {0} has suffered permanent damage to {1} {2} due to an advancement of {3} infection.
